ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the user's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the user's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used by the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used for the order */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate applicable to the order */,
  "shipping_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping rate applicable to the order */,
  "tax_price" TEXT /* Total tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_price" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the order has been paid */,
  "paid_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was paid */,
  "is_delivered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the order has been delivered */,
  "delivered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was delivered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_rate_id") REFERENCES shipping_rates ("shipping_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the tax rate applies */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the tax rate applies */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Tax rate percentage */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., sales tax, VAT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_rates" (
  "shipping_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rate */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination for shipping */,
  "method" TEXT /* Shipping method */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Shipping cost */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status update */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
